headline: Costco shares good news as gas prices spike
summary: Costco has shared that it raises gas prices more slowly than it raises them. Basically, Costco takes a lower margin on gas sales while prices are rising, but makes that up as they fall. Former Costco CFO Richard Galanti defended that practice, discussing the warehouse club’s gas business during its ...
